en.name: Flutter App (Private)
en.cardTagline: Role-based mobile communication with product discipline.
en.cardDescription: A private Flutter build focused on real-time flows, role-aware experience, and a cleaner product architecture than a generic chat demo.
en.headline: A private mobile build exploring role logic, real-time communication, and a more serious product mindset.
en.summary: This Flutter app is treated as a mobile product study rather than a tutorial clone. It focuses on structured communication, privacy-aware flows, and scalable state thinking.
en.challenge: Real-time apps become messy fast when roles, permissions, and flow states are not designed early.
en.solution: The build uses Flutter and Firebase to shape communication around clearer roles, cleaner flows, and controlled product behavior.
en.impact: It strengthens mobile architecture thinking, real-time state handling, and the ability to design private systems with discipline.
goals: Design a private app with clearer role boundaries.
Build stronger Flutter and Firebase confidence through a real scenario.
Create a mobile flow that feels product-minded, not experimental.
features: Role-aware screens and structured communication flow.
Mobile-first layout thinking with privacy in mind.
Foundation for richer permissions and moderation later.
future: Expand permission and role management layers.
Add stronger profile handling and workflow depth.

gallery.label: Frame 01
gallery.title: Onboarding flow
gallery.description: A controlled first-touch experience where access, role, and product tone are introduced clearly.

gallery.label: Frame 02
gallery.title: Live communication state
gallery.description: The key screen where real-time messaging and clarity of interaction must stay balanced.

gallery.label: Frame 03
gallery.title: Role management layer
gallery.description: A supporting view for permissions, structure, and the private logic behind the app.

en.privateNote: The build remains private for now, so the public site focuses on architecture and product thinking rather than full implementation access.

kz.name: Flutter App (Private)
kz.cardTagline: Role-based mobile communication және product discipline.
kz.cardDescription: Real-time flow, role-aware experience және generic chat demo-дан жоғары cleaner product architecture-ға бағытталған private Flutter build.
kz.headline: Role logic, real-time communication және байыптырақ product mindset зерттейтін private mobile build.
kz.summary: Бұл Flutter app tutorial clone емес, mobile product study ретінде қаралады. Негізгі фокус — structured communication, privacy-aware flow және scalable state thinking.
kz.challenge: Role, permission және flow state ерте жобаланбаса, real-time app-тар тез ретсіз болып кетеді.
kz.solution: Build Flutter мен Firebase арқылы communication-ды анық role-дар, cleaner flow және controlled product behavior айналасына жинайды.
kz.impact: Бұл жоба mobile architecture thinking-ті, real-time state handling-ті және private system-дерді тәртіппен жобалау қабілетін күшейтеді.
goals: Role boundary-і анық private app жобалау.
Нақты scenario арқылы Flutter мен Firebase сенімділігін күшейту.
Experimental емес, product-minded mobile flow құру.
features: Role-aware screen-дер және structured communication flow.
Privacy-ге назар аударатын mobile-first layout thinking.
Кейінгі permission мен moderation үшін негіз.
future: Permission және role management layer-лерін кеңейту.
Profile handling пен workflow depth-ті күшейту.

gallery.label: Frame 01
gallery.title: Onboarding flow
gallery.description: Access, role және product tone анық берілетін controlled first-touch experience.

gallery.label: Frame 02
gallery.title: Live communication state
gallery.description: Real-time messaging пен interaction clarity теңгерілуі керек негізгі экран.

gallery.label: Frame 03
gallery.title: Role management layer
gallery.description: Permission, structure және app артындағы private logic-ті көрсететін supporting view.

kz.privateNote: Build әзірге private, сондықтан public сайт толық implementation емес, architecture мен product thinking-ке назар аударады.

ru.name: Flutter App (Private)
ru.cardTagline: Role-based mobile communication с product discipline.
ru.cardDescription: Приватный Flutter build, сфокусированный на real-time flow, role-aware experience и более чистой product architecture, чем у generic chat demo.
ru.headline: Приватный mobile build, исследующий role logic, real-time communication и более серьезный product mindset.
ru.summary: Этот Flutter app рассматривается как mobile product study, а не как tutorial clone. Фокус — structured communication, privacy-aware flow и scalable state thinking.
ru.challenge: Real-time приложения быстро становятся хаотичными, если roles, permissions и flow states не проектируются заранее.
ru.solution: Build использует Flutter и Firebase, чтобы собрать communication вокруг более ясных ролей, cleaner flow и контролируемого product behavior.
ru.impact: Проект усиливает mobile architecture thinking, real-time state handling и умение дисциплинированно проектировать private systems.
goals: Спроектировать private app с более четкими role boundaries.
Укрепить Flutter и Firebase уверенность через реальный сценарий.
Собрать mobile flow, который ощущается product-minded, а не экспериментальным.
features: Role-aware screens и structured communication flow.
Mobile-first layout thinking с учетом privacy.
Основа для более богатых permission и moderation слоев позже.
future: Расширить permission и role management layers.
Добавить более сильный profile handling и workflow depth.

gallery.label: Frame 01
gallery.title: Onboarding flow
gallery.description: Контролируемый first-touch experience, где доступ, role и тон продукта объясняются ясно.

gallery.label: Frame 02
gallery.title: Live communication state
gallery.description: Ключевой экран, где real-time messaging и clarity взаимодействия должны оставаться в балансе.

gallery.label: Frame 03
gallery.title: Role management layer
gallery.description: Supporting view для permissions, structure и private logic внутри приложения.

ru.privateNote: Build пока остается private, поэтому публичный сайт подчеркивает architecture и product thinking вместо полного доступа к implementation.
